ePortfolio — Engineering & Finance

MEHROZ
KHAN

Mechanical Engineering & Finance | Interflow

I am in my second year of Mechanical Engineering & Finance and am incredibly passionate about construction and providing quality solutions for the improvement of the greater company. This is primarily through infrastructure upgrade such as pipeline and/or skyrise buildings. During my time at university, I’ve had the privilege of working at Interflow where I have developed my skills in project management and a deeper understanding of trenchless pipeline solutions. It was my time working alongside different project team that ultimately led to my interest in working in the construction industry despite being a Mechanical Major. I remain passionate and hard-working as I continue my time with Interflow and seek to learn at every given opportunity.
